verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Throughout my years from a little child I can honestly say God has stayed by my side And although I did't claim Him as my Lord He loved me through rebellion to His Word And I could hear a distant voice calling me home He never left me alone

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And since I walk through this glorious life Satan battles and I'm in a constant fight But the Lord He still helps me to overcome He knows the pressure that's been left on the Bride Each day is another step closer home He's been there every day And He'll never leave me alone

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He's always been there He saw each valley He knew every heartache that I went through He knew the pain and despair He heard each teardrop that fell I thank God He never left me alone

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In the darkness of the midnight I hear Satan come around He say's, "You'll lose in the battle. You're not gaining any ground." And just as I'm giving up I hear that same voice He says, "Child, pick up your sword!" And through the war I hear Him say, "I'll never leave you fighting alone."

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He saw each valley He knew each teardrop that fell I thank God He never left me alone
